---
title: "CV"
---

## Curriculum Vitae

The existing CV PDF is still available below.

[Open CV PDF](static/uploads/resume.pdf)

## Current Snapshot

### Position

PhD Candidate, Yonsei University

### Research Interests

- Label-efficient learning
- Representation learning
- Semantic segmentation
- Object localization

### Experience

- Research Intern, NAVER AI Lab, July 2023 to December 2023

### Education

- PhD in Integrated Technology, Yonsei University
- BSc in Computer Science, Yonsei University

As part of the Quarto migration, this page can later be expanded into a web-native CV with publications, awards, teaching, and service.
